records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha, are you okay? We're almost at the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha, are you okay? We're almost at the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha, are you okay? We're almost at the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have your meds at home?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have your meds at home?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have your meds at home?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... I think they're out...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... I think they're out...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... I think they're out...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I know where the pharmacy is. I'll go get them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I know where the pharmacy is. I'll go get them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I know where the pharmacy is. I'll go get them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't go... Mavka...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't go... Mavka...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't go... Mavka...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just going to get your meds. Sit tight, and I'll be right back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just going to get your meds. Sit tight, and I'll be right back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just going to get your meds. Sit tight, and I'll be right back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I don't want you to go...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I don't want you to go...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I don't want you to go...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll go instead. You stay with Sasha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll go instead. You stay with Sasha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll go instead. You stay with Sasha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you buy me some ice cream on your way back? Even though I'm sure there aren't any...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you buy me some ice cream on your way back? Even though I'm sure there aren't any...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you buy me some ice cream on your way back? Even though I'm sure there aren't any...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you joke right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you joke right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you joke right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahh... Mavka's cold hands feel nice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahh... Mavka's cold hands feel nice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahh... Mavka's cold hands feel nice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you keep one on my forehead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you keep one on my forehead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you keep one on my forehead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the other on my stomach?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the other on my stomach?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the other on my stomach?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you're heavy, so don't put too much pressure...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you're heavy, so don't put too much pressure...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you're heavy, so don't put too much pressure...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You keep talking nonsense, and I'll really smack you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You keep talking nonsense, and I'll really smack you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You keep talking nonsense, and I'll really smack you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you don't have to keep pretending to be joyful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you don't have to keep pretending to be joyful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you don't have to keep pretending to be joyful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...? Do I seem like that to you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...? Do I seem like that to you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...? Do I seem like that to you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ehehe. Mavka's worried about me again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ehehe. Mavka's worried about me again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ehehe. Mavka's worried about me again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just get some rest, stupid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just get some rest, stupid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just get some rest, stupid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Egh! Kuh! G-gently! Pat me gently...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Egh! Kuh! G-gently! Pat me gently...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Egh! Kuh! G-gently! Pat me gently...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, she falls asleep fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, she falls asleep fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, she falls asleep fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Open up. Is Sasha all right?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Open up. Is Sasha all right?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Open up. Is Sasha all right?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: She just fell asleep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She just fell asleep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She just fell asleep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You really came back with ice cream?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You really came back with ice cream?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You really came back with ice cream?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We work with her a lot. I can do this much for her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We work with her a lot. I can do this much for her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We work with her a lot. I can do this much for her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka, can I talk to you outside for a minute?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka, can I talk to you outside for a minute?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka, can I talk to you outside for a minute?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You still have more to say to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You still have more to say to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You still have more to say to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know why the village people care a lot about Sasha?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know why the village people care a lot about Sasha?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know why the village people care a lot about Sasha?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because she's a Counter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because she's a Counter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because she's a Counter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, that would be one reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, that would be one reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, that would be one reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before she arrived in Ciringrad... this place was hopeless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before she arrived in Ciringrad... this place was hopeless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before she arrived in Ciringrad... this place was hopeless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People were deceiving and stealing from others every day, unable to overcome the hardship of living here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People were deceiving and stealing from others every day, unable to overcome the hardship of living here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People were deceiving and stealing from others every day, unable to overcome the hardship of living here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, Sasha came.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, Sasha came.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, Sasha came.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She used her ability to make necessary items to give to the people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She used her ability to make necessary items to give to the people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She used her ability to make necessary items to give to the people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what was so fun about all of it, but she always had a smile on her face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what was so fun about all of it, but she always had a smile on her face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what was so fun about all of it, but she always had a smile on her face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I thought it was all pointless, but I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I thought it was all pointless, but I was wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I thought it was all pointless, but I was wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Soon, I could hear laughter on the streets as the village gradually changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Soon, I could hear laughter on the streets as the village gradually changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Soon, I could hear laughter on the streets as the village gradually changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't believe it... After all, all she did was fix a few things...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't believe it... After all, all she did was fix a few things...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't believe it... After all, all she did was fix a few things...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I wonder if Sasha's ability is really just <color=#ffd34c>fixing things</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I wonder if Sasha's ability is really just <color=#ffd34c>fixing things</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I wonder if Sasha's ability is really just <color=#ffd34c>fixing things</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka. We are still unsure about you, but it seems that Sasha trusts you wholeheartedly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka. We are still unsure about you, but it seems that Sasha trusts you wholeheartedly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka. We are still unsure about you, but it seems that Sasha trusts you wholeheartedly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I just hope that we never have to fight each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I just hope that we never have to fight each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I just hope that we never have to fight each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should feed Sasha something when she wakes up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should feed Sasha something when she wakes up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should feed Sasha something when she wakes up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope she doesn't wake up while I'm out grocery shopping...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope she doesn't wake up while I'm out grocery shopping...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope she doesn't wake up while I'm out grocery shopping...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop it, Mom! I'm not a child anymore! I'm an adult!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop it, Mom! I'm not a child anymore! I'm an adult!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop it, Mom! I'm not a child anymore! I'm an adult!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! Even if you're an adult, I can't let you join the militia!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! Even if you're an adult, I can't let you join the militia!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! Even if you're an adult, I can't let you join the militia!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Oh?! There you are!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Oh?! There you are!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Oh?! There you are!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, silver hair!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, silver hair!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, silver hair!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... what was your name again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... what was your name again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... what was your name again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't even know the name of the person you're looking for, kid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't even know the name of the person you're looking for, kid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't even know the name of the person you're looking for, kid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha told me about you. You're the girl who plays pretend hero.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha told me about you. You're the girl who plays pretend hero.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha told me about you. You're the girl who plays pretend hero.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm not a kid! You and I are the same height!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm not a kid! You and I are the same height!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm not a kid! You and I are the same height!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Mavka. Remember that. You were looking for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Mavka. Remember that. You were looking for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Mavka. Remember that. You were looking for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right! Help me persuade my mom!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right! Help me persuade my mom!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right! Help me persuade my mom!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You brat! I told you not to run around in crowded places!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You brat! I told you not to run around in crowded places!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You brat! I told you not to run around in crowded places!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you're the girl who was with Sasha. I apologize for my daughter's behavior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you're the girl who was with Sasha. I apologize for my daughter's behavior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you're the girl who was with Sasha. I apologize for my daughter's behavior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She keeps making a fuss about wanting to join the Northern Army or the militia...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She keeps making a fuss about wanting to join the Northern Army or the militia...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She keeps making a fuss about wanting to join the Northern Army or the militia...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I assume you saw the poster.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I assume you saw the poster.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I assume you saw the poster.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So why do you want to become a soldier?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So why do you want to become a soldier?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So why do you want to become a soldier?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because they're national heroes! They're strong and cool!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because they're national heroes! They're strong and cool!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because they're national heroes! They're strong and cool!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're one of those heroes from the poster, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're one of those heroes from the poster, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're one of those heroes from the poster, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A national hero... Are you sure you want to say that when you're a resident of Ciringrad?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A national hero... Are you sure you want to say that when you're a resident of Ciringrad?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A national hero... Are you sure you want to say that when you're a resident of Ciringrad?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to join, get dispatched to Ciringrad and become a soldier who protects the village!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to join, get dispatched to Ciringrad and become a soldier who protects the village!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to join, get dispatched to Ciringrad and become a soldier who protects the village!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to become a super-strong Counter and make this village great!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to become a super-strong Counter and make this village great!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to become a super-strong Counter and make this village great!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch! D-don't hit me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch! D-don't hit me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch! D-don't hit me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen, brat. First of all, soldiers don't get a say on where they get assigned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen, brat. First of all, soldiers don't get a say on where they get assigned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen, brat. First of all, soldiers don't get a say on where they get assigned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, I heard that the Northern Union doesn't acknowledge this place as a part of its territory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, I heard that the Northern Union doesn't acknowledge this place as a part of its territory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, I heard that the Northern Union doesn't acknowledge this place as a part of its territory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lastly, the Northern Army isn't a cool entity like you imagine it is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lastly, the Northern Army isn't a cool entity like you imagine it is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lastly, the Northern Army isn't a cool entity like you imagine it is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't go into details, but the poster is merely propaganda.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't go into details, but the poster is merely propaganda.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't go into details, but the poster is merely propaganda.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, wake up and take good care of your mother. Got that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, wake up and take good care of your mother. Got that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, wake up and take good care of your mother. Got that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way! You're just scared that I might get stronger than you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way! You're just scared that I might get stronger than you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way! You're just scared that I might get stronger than you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just you wait! I'll come back as the strongest soldier you've ever seen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just you wait! I'll come back as the strongest soldier you've ever seen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just you wait! I'll come back as the strongest soldier you've ever seen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! You stop right there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! You stop right there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! You stop right there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: A national hero...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A national hero...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A national hero...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come to think of it, I didn't bring any money...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come to think of it, I didn't bring any money...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come to think of it, I didn't bring any money...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly... I thought it was all pointless, but I was wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly... I thought it was all pointless, but I was wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly... I thought it was all pointless, but I was wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Soon, I could hear laughter on the streets as the village gradually changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Soon, I could hear laughter on the streets as the village gradually changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Soon, I could hear laughter on the streets as the village gradually changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't believe it... After all, all she did was fix a few things...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't believe it... After all, all she did was fix a few things...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't believe it... After all, all she did was fix a few things...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I wonder if Sasha's ability is really just <color=#ffd34c>fixing things</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I wonder if Sasha's ability is really just <color=#ffd34c>fixing things</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I wonder if Sasha's ability is really just <color=#ffd34c>fixing things</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mavka. We are still unsure about you, but it seems that Sasha trusts you wholeheartedly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mavka. We are still unsure about you, but it seems that Sasha trusts you wholeheartedly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mavka. We are still unsure about you, but it seems that Sasha trusts you wholeheartedly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I just hope that we never have to fight each other.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I just hope that we never have to fight each other.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I just hope that we never have to fight each other.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I should feed Sasha something when she wakes up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I should feed Sasha something when she wakes up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I should feed Sasha something when she wakes up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope she doesn't wake up while I'm out grocery shopping...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope she doesn't wake up while I'm out grocery shopping...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope she doesn't wake up while I'm out grocery shopping...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop it, Mom! I'm not a child anymore! I'm an adult!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop it, Mom! I'm not a child anymore! I'm an adult!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop it, Mom! I'm not a child anymore! I'm an adult!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No! Even if you're an adult, I can't let you join the militia!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No! Even if you're an adult, I can't let you join the militia!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No! Even if you're an adult, I can't let you join the militia!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Oh?! There you are!</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Oh?! There you are!</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Oh?! There you are!</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, silver hair!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, silver hair!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, silver hair!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... what was your name again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... what was your name again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... what was your name again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't even know the name of the person you're looking for, kid?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't even know the name of the person you're looking for, kid?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't even know the name of the person you're looking for, kid?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sasha told me about you. You're the girl who plays pretend hero.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sasha told me about you. You're the girl who plays pretend hero.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sasha told me about you. You're the girl who plays pretend hero.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm not a kid! You and I are the same height!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm not a kid! You and I are the same height!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm not a kid! You and I are the same height!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Mavka. Remember that. You were looking for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Mavka. Remember that. You were looking for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Mavka. Remember that. You were looking for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right! Help me persuade my mom!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right! Help me persuade my mom!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right! Help me persuade my mom!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You brat! I told you not to run around in crowded places!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You brat! I told you not to run around in crowded places!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You brat! I told you not to run around in crowded places!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you're the girl who was with Sasha. I apologize for my daughter's behavior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you're the girl who was with Sasha. I apologize for my daughter's behavior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you're the girl who was with Sasha. I apologize for my daughter's behavior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She keeps making a fuss about wanting to join the Northern Army or the militia...
root.m_Talk_DEU: She keeps making a fuss about wanting to join the Northern Army or the militia...
root.m_Talk_FRA: She keeps making a fuss about wanting to join the Northern Army or the militia...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I assume you saw the poster.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I assume you saw the poster.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I assume you saw the poster.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So why do you want to become a soldier?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So why do you want to become a soldier?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So why do you want to become a soldier?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because they're national heroes! They're strong and cool!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because they're national heroes! They're strong and cool!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because they're national heroes! They're strong and cool!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're one of those heroes from the poster, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're one of those heroes from the poster, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're one of those heroes from the poster, aren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A national hero... Are you sure you want to say that when you're a resident of Ciringrad?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A national hero... Are you sure you want to say that when you're a resident of Ciringrad?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A national hero... Are you sure you want to say that when you're a resident of Ciringrad?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to join, get dispatched to Ciringrad and become a soldier who protects the village!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to join, get dispatched to Ciringrad and become a soldier who protects the village!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to join, get dispatched to Ciringrad and become a soldier who protects the village!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to become a super-strong Counter and make this village great!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to become a super-strong Counter and make this village great!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to become a super-strong Counter and make this village great!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch! D-don't hit me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch! D-don't hit me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch! D-don't hit me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Listen, brat. First of all, soldiers don't get a say on where they get assigned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Listen, brat. First of all, soldiers don't get a say on where they get assigned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Listen, brat. First of all, soldiers don't get a say on where they get assigned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, I heard that the Northern Union doesn't acknowledge this place as a part of its territory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, I heard that the Northern Union doesn't acknowledge this place as a part of its territory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, I heard that the Northern Union doesn't acknowledge this place as a part of its territory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lastly, the Northern Army isn't a cool entity like you imagine it is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lastly, the Northern Army isn't a cool entity like you imagine it is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lastly, the Northern Army isn't a cool entity like you imagine it is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't go into details, but the poster is merely propaganda.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't go into details, but the poster is merely propaganda.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't go into details, but the poster is merely propaganda.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, wake up and take good care of your mother. Got that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, wake up and take good care of your mother. Got that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, wake up and take good care of your mother. Got that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way! You're just scared that I might get stronger than you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way! You're just scared that I might get stronger than you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way! You're just scared that I might get stronger than you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just you wait! I'll come back as the strongest soldier you've ever seen!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just you wait! I'll come back as the strongest soldier you've ever seen!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just you wait! I'll come back as the strongest soldier you've ever seen!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! You stop right there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! You stop right there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! You stop right there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: A national hero...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A national hero...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A national hero...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come to think of it, I didn't bring any money...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come to think of it, I didn't bring any money...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come to think of it, I didn't bring any money...
